text:
Dear Friend,

I wanted to take a moment to tell you how much your friendship has meant to me. As you prepare for this new chapter, I find myself reflecting on all the memories we've shared and the laughs we've had together. Those moments have been truly special.

I know this move is an exciting opportunity for you, and I'm genuinely happy that you're taking this step toward something new. You've always had the courage to chase your dreams, and I admire that about you. I have no doubt that you're going to do wonderful things wherever you go.

Even though we'll be apart, please know that you'll always have a friend in me. Distance might change our geography, but it won't change what we mean to each other. I hope we'll stay in touch and find ways to keep our friendship strong, whether that's through phone calls, messages, or visits whenever life allows.

Thank you for being the kind of friend who makes life richer just by being in it. I'm going to miss you, but I'm rooting for you every step of the way. I can't wait to hear all about your adventures in your new home.

Wishing you all the best as you start this exciting journey. Take care of yourself, and don't be a stranger.

With warmth and friendship,
[Your name]
